issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card states '[When Attacking]' which is an attack trigger.

Action sequence is incomplete. Should include: (1) look at 3 cards from deck, (2) reveal up to 1 Revolutionary Army Character, (3) add to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only has basic SearchDeck.
Filter is 'Any' but should specify 'Revolutionary Army' type Characters. The effect restricts to this type.

SearchDeck does not capture the 'look at 3 cards' mechanic and the requirement to place non-selected cards at bottom. This needs a more complex action structure or multiple actions to represent the full effect.
